entity.description:
- Capture highly detailed photos and videos with rich colors, even in challenging lighting conditions.
- Adapt your vlogging setup with a wide array of interchangeable lenses to achieve the perfect shot every time.
- Record ultra-clear 4K video with full pixel readout and no pixel binning, ensuring professional-grade footage.
- Capture crisp, clear audio with minimal background noise, ideal for outdoor vlogging scenarios.
- Easily create a stunning background blur effect with the press of a button, making your subject stand out.
- Benefit from rapid, precise autofocus with real-time Eye AF and subject tracking for both people and animals.
- Effortlessly compose your shots with the 3-inch flip-out touchscreen, perfect for selfies and creative angles.
- Instantly shift focus from your face to an item in front of the camera, perfect for product demonstrations and reviews.
- Enjoy easy portability with the ZV-E10’s compact design, making it the perfect companion for on-the-go creators.
- Stream live with ease, connecting directly to your audience, ideal for content creators and vloggers.

product.description:
Photo & Video
- Aperture: F2.85
- 35mm Equivalent Focal Length: 14.27mm
- Photo Resolution: Up to 50MP 50MP: 8192x6144 (4:3) 37MP: 8192x4608 (16:9) 12MP: 4096x3072 (4:3) 9MP: 4096x2304 (16:9)
- Photo Format: JPG, DNG (can be exported to JPG via Insta360 app or Studio)
- Video Format: MP4
- Photo Mode: Photo, HDR Photo, Live Photo, Interval Photo, Starlapse, Burst Photo
- Video Mode: Core Recording Modes: Video, PureVideo, FreeFrame Video, Toddler Titan, TimeShift, Timelapse, Loop Recording, Slow Motion Derivative ecording Modes: Pre-Recording, Interval Video, Timed Capture
- Color Preset: Standard, Glow, Selfie, Vivid, Film, Vintage, Urban, Night

Video Resolution
- Highest Video Quality: 4K60fps
- Highest Video Performance: 1080p240fps
- Video: *Active HDR can be turned on or off up to 4K30fps. 4K (4:3): 3840x2880@30/25/24fps 4K (16:9): 3840x2160@60/50/48/30/25/24fps 4K (2.35:1): 3840x1632@60/50/48/30/25/24fps 2.7K (4:3): 2688x2016@30/25/24fps 2.7K (16:9): 2688x1520@120/100/60/50/48/30/25/24fps 1080p (4:3): 1920x1440@30/25/24fps 1080p (16:9): 1920x1080@240/200/120/100/60/50/48/30/25/24fps
- PureVideo 4K (16:9): 3840x2160@30/25/24fps 2.7K (16:9): 2688x1520@30/25/24fps 1080p (16:9): 1920x1080@30/25/24fps
- FreeFrame Video 4K (4:3): 4096x3072@30/25/2fps 2.7K (4:3): 2688x2016@30/25/24fps 1440p (4:3): 1920x1440@30/25/24fps
- Toddler Titan 4K (4:3): 3840x2880@30/25/24fps 4K (16:9): 3840x2160@30/25/24fps 2.7K (4:3): 2688x2016@30/25/24fps 2.7K (16:9): 2688x1520@30/25/24fps 1080p (4:3): 1920x1440@30/25/24fps 1080p (16:9): 1920x1080@30/25/24fps
- TimeShift 4K (4:3): 3840x2880@30fps 2.7K (4:3): 2688x2016@30fps 4K (16:9): 3840x2160@30fps 2.7K (16:9): 2688x1520@30fps
- Timelapse 4K (16:9): 3840x2160@30fps 4K (4:3): 3840x2880@30fps
- Loop Recording *Active HDR can be turned on or off up to 4K30fps. 4K (4:3): 3840x2880@30/25/24fps 4K (16:9): 3840x2160@60/50/48/30/25/24fps 2.7K (4:3): 2688x2016@30/25/24fps 2.7K (16:9): 2688x1520@60/50/48/30/25/24fps 1080p (4:3): 1920x1440@30/25/24fps 1080p (16:9): 1920x1080@60/50/48/30/25/24fps
- Slow Motion 2.7K (16:9): 2688x1520 @120/100fps 1080p (16:9): 1920x1080@240/200/120/100fps
- Portrait Mode 4K (4:3): 3840x2880@30/25/24fps 4K (16:9): 3840x2160@30/25/24fps 4K (2.35:1): 3840x1632@30/25/24fps 2.7K (4:3): 2688x2016@30/25/24fps 2.7K (16:9): 2688x1520@30/25/24fps 1080p (4:3): 1920x1440@30/25/24fps 1080p (16:9): 1920x1080@30/25/24fps

Hardware
- Color: Arctic White, Midnight Black
- Video coding: H.264, H.265
- Max. Video Bitrate: 180Mbps
- Gyroscope: 6-axis

Weight
- Standalone Camera: 52.9±0.5g (1.9±0.02oz)
- Action Pod: 108.5±0.5g (3.8oz±0.02oz)
- Dimensions (W × H × D)

- Standalone Camera: 46x45.7x18.3mm (1.8x1.8x0.7in) With Lens Guard: 46x45.7x22.4mm (1.8x1.8x0.9in)
- Action Pod (Touchscreen Closed): 70.4x48.8x33.3mm (2.8x1.9x1.3in)
- Action Pod (Touchscreen Open): 70.4x91.2x33.6mm (2.8x3.6x1.3in)

Compatible iOS Devices
Compatible with iOS devices with A12 chips or above and iOS 13.0 or later, including: iPhone XS, iPhone XS Max, iPhone 11, iPhone 11 Pro, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone 12, iPhone 12 Pro, iPhone 12 Pro Max, iPhone 12 mini, iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Pro, iPhone 13 Pro Max, iPhone 13 mini, iPhone 14, iPhone 14 Plus, iPhone 14 Pro, iPhone 14 Pro Max, iPhone 15, iPhone 15 Plus, iPhone 15 Pro, iPhone 15 Pro Max, iPhone 16, iPhone 16 Plus, iPhone 16 Pro, iPhone 16 Pro Max, iPad Air (2020), iPad Pro and newer models.

*To use Apple Find My to locate your GO Ultra, the latest version of iOS, iPadOS, or macOS is recommended.

Compatible Android Devices
Compatible with Android devices that meet the following capabilities including:

- Android devices with Kirin 990 and newer chips, including Huawei Mate 30, P40 or newer models.
- Android devices with Snapdragon 855 and newer chips, including Samsung Galaxy S10, Xiaomi Mi 9 or newer models.
- Android devices with Exynos 2200 and newer chips, including Samsung Galaxy S22, S22 Ultra and newer models. (Requires Android 10.0 or above, or HarmonyOS 2.0.0 or above. HarmonyOS NEXT is not supported)

Note:
1. Devices that do not meet the above requirements may still be able to use the app to control the camera. However, the performance of some processor-intensive and AI-powered features may be sub-optimal.
2. Phones equipped with Qualcomm SDM765 5G chips have poor hardware decoding capabilities and are not supported for use, such as OPPO Reno 3 5G.
3. App installation requires a 64-bit smartphone. A 32-bit system does not support app installation.
